financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did well in its home market, selling more products than ever before.
However, a cyber issue hurt one part of the business, and they borrowed more money than they made.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well despite a recent cyber incident that disrupted production and increased costs.
Debt levels are high, and the company doesn't expect to have extra cash for a while, but they are working on a plan.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Poor
bullets: The company is not doing well overall in social and governance areas.
They are performing better in environmental efforts, but still have room for improvement.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company's leaders showed a mix of confidence and worry during their talk.
Concerns about money problems and disruptions made the overall mood more negative.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some numbers but didn't give a full picture of their future plans.
They often said more details would come later, which makes it hard to fully understand their current situation.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well in some areas like electric cars, but faces problems like cyber issues and tariffs.
Even though there are challenges, the overall feeling about the company's future is very positive.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: The company faced big problems due to a cyber attack, which hurt its production and finances.
Despite these issues, new car launches and strong sales in India show promise for future growth.
